Compliance.description: SARB PA since 2019; FSCA FSP; linked to Discovery group compliance; no major 2025/26 sanctions.

Customer Satisfaction.description: Strong loyalty from Vitality users; complaints from non-vitality clients; mixed HelloPeter.

Product Value.description: Dynamic Interest up to 9.75%; Vitality Money rewards strong for health-conscious users; high base fees.

Innovation.description: Behavioural banking model, Vitality Money integration, real-time rewards, AI-powered insights.

Customer Support.description: Good in-app; complaints about onboarding and support delays, particularly fraud.

Accessibility & Security.description: Digital-first; app quality high; POPIA; but requires Discovery ecosystem for best value; some security incidents.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Gold from R195/mo; Platinum from R345; Black from R695; linked to Vitality plan

socialSentiment.summary: Vitality users highly positive; non-Vitality see limited value.
